stimulus:
Experiment Instructions

This research study is about understanding how people form impressions of others based on faces. This study has two stages. This is Stage 1.

Stage 1 takes around 15 minutes and pays $3.75 for your participation. If you pass an assessment in Stage 1, you will advance to Stage 2. Stage 2 takes around 37 minutes and pays $9.25 for your participation.

Thus you will be paid $13 in total for completing both stages. Please make sure that you have enough time (~52min) without interruption for both stages before continuing!
